title: Buttery Crumbly Peruvian Dates Crumble
description: A grape leaf-topped crumble featuring dates, nuts, and spices for a satisfying date-night dish that's egg-free-friendly.

ingredients.name: Pitted Medjool dates
ingredients.notes: About the size of a thumb

ingredients.name: Coconut milk
ingredients.notes: Thickened with arrowroot starch to make the crumble base

ingredients.name: Arrowroot starch
ingredients.notes: Starch for thickening the date mixture and crumble base

instructions: Heat coconut oil in a pan, add dates and cook until softened and caramelized.
Add ginger powder, cinnamon, and vanilla extract; mix well. Add arrowroot starch for thickening.
Mix ground walnuts into the date mixture. Transfer to individual grape leaf pouches.
Melt butter and spread evenly over each grape leaf filled with dates.
Place in oven at 180°C (350°F) for about 20 minutes or until golden brown on top and dates are bubbling.
Serve warm as a dessert dish.
